seoTitle: East Ballidu vs East Beverley — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between East Ballidu and East Beverley. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: East Ballidu vs East Beverley: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in East Ballidu and East Beverley.
heading: East Ballidu vs East Beverley — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between East Ballidu, Western Australia and East Beverley, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: East Beverley has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to East Ballidu (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is East Ballidu or East Beverley safer from flooding?
faq.answer: East Ballidu has a flood risk score of 40/100, while East Beverley scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: East Ballidu scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. East Beverley scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in East Ballidu or East Beverley?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. East Beverley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
